untranslatable_reason: Signal requires three confluent layers: (1) Fundamental metrics (supply/demand imbalance via two independent sources) — not available as price-based indicators; (2) Psychological/news sentiment (2+ consecutive news events with directional alignment) — sentiment data and news event detection not in allowed indicator set; (3) Technical confirmation (5-bar minimum with MA alignment) — partially translatable but news/sentiment components cannot be quantified with available indicators. The core edge depends on external fundamental and sentiment data sources unavailable in backtest engine.
translation_notes: Translated only the technical component (price vs SMA_50 + 5-bar confirmation approximated via returns threshold). Entry conditions use close crossing SMA_50 plus 2%+ return threshold (approximating 5-bar directional move). Exit conditions use SMA_50 breakdown or 2x risk target (4% vs 2% entry). However, this is a partial translation missing the fundamental supply/demand metrics and market psychology/news sentiment components that are critical to the original signal's edge. A complete implementation would require external data feeds for fundamental metrics and sentiment scoring.
